data.name: Heart Cage
data.detailed_description:
病嬌 x 乙女 x 懸疑!!!

你因為要進行某項調查而進入了一個神秘的小鎮,

卻不幸地被捲入了一場連環殺人案?!

與此同時,多位神秘的居民漸漸走近你,並對你異常執著...

小心! 真相遠比你想像中可怕!

遊戲特色

♥全部攻略對象均是病嬌！

♥每條路線含至少4個或上的性愛情節!

♥全配音劇情，沉浸感十足！

♥200+張精美Cg

♥約20多個結局可供解鎖

♥享受被全員寵溺、戀愛感滿瀉的故事！

♥懸疑感100%，一邊享受戀愛一邊調查真相！

♥攻略對象各自擁有不同性僻，而且部份角色為非人類，滿足你不同的需求！

♥遊戲包含調查現場的玩法，代入偵探角色

♥含克蘇魯元素的乙女遊戲

角色介紹

你-奥莉．安蒂希亞(名字可更改)

原本在城市的卡特偵探社當偵探，因接收到突如其來的神秘委託，而暫時搬到烏索達爾小鎮。性格樂天善良，有很强的觀察力和直覺。

曾經有一段難以抹去的童年陰影，目標是尋找父母當年被殺的原因。

戴恩．哥迪奥比

CV:Nick Chang

烏索達爾鎮的居民之一。你的新房東，在你的事務所樓下經營寵物咖啡廳。溫柔的鄰家大哥哥，沖的咖啡世界級好喝。

非常照顧你，無論你遇到什麼危險也會第一個出來幫助你。

似乎對你的一切都瞭如指掌，甚至到了有點病態的地步。與你曾經有一段過去, 但你卻完全不記得...

盧克．厄拉赫文

CV:John Patneaude

幾個月前從外地過來烏索達爾鎮的特務調查員。平時一副遊手好閑的樣子，與鎮上居民關係非常好，很受大家歡迎，實際上卻有不為人知的一面。似乎看上了你的某個特質，並對你虎視眈眈。

只要是他想得到的獵物，從來都不會失敗。

伊諾克斯． 哈佛達夫

CV:Corey Wilder

烏索達爾鎮的居民之一。聲稱是化學家，但真實身份和職業成謎，有傳聞跟黑幫有所聯繫。

因為某個原因，幾乎不與任何人接觸，直至遇到剛來鎮上的你後，生活出現天翻地覆的轉變。對你又愛又恨。

對氣味非常敏感，你的氣味甚至令他有生理反應。

席德． 懷特奈特

CV:Logan Fletcher

你的青梅竹馬，並與你同為卡特偵探社當的偵探，處事方式極度我行我素。

表面對你不瞅不睬，但實際上非常關心你，總是在暗中保護著你。

G#

CV:Harold Ingram

知名地下樂團SOUL的主音。十分受歡迎。對你一見鍾情，像一只小狗一樣天天跟着你。為了引起你的注意，總是躲在意想不到的地方偷襲你。

與戴恩是舊識，兩人原本關係不錯，但因為某些原因變得愈來愈差。

卡特·馬伯里(此角色路線將在後續免費更新)

CV:Brandon P Jenkins

卡特偵探社當的的老闆，你的上司。以前曾經是警察，並承諾幫你調查父母被殺的原因，一直暗地保護你。與戴恩是舊相識。很愛錢。

外表看來靠不住但實際上很認真，為達成目的不惜一切代價，業內的人都不敢招惹他。

不知不覺對你產生保護者以上的感情。

data.short_description: 病嬌 x 乙女 x 懸疑!Heart Cage 是一款全員病嬌的乙女向成人遊戲,你將扮演一位女偵探,與他們建立危險又刺激的愛情關係並查出故事的真相...!
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 繁體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 SP1 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
  • 儲存空間: 3 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.10+
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo (64 bit only)
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

data.name: Heart Cage
data.detailed_description:
Yandere x Otome x Mystery!!

You are a detective who has just moved to a new town. You are involved in a serial killer case, and three mysterious residents (Or more?!) are approaching you!

Don't trust anyone! But... can you?

Game features

♥Dive into a captivating world with centered around charming yandere characters! Experience 15-20+ hours of gameplay.

♥ Experience a fully voiced story with over 200+ stunning CGs and 20+ unique endings to unlock!

♥ Each route have at least 4 or above sex events!

♥ Indulge in a heartwarming story where you’re showered with love and attention from every character!

♥ Feel the 100% suspense as you navigate romance while unraveling deep mysteries!

♥ Each character boasts their own quirks, with some being non-human, perfectly catering to your wildest fantasies!

♥ Engage in investigative gameplay that lets you step into the shoes of a detective.

♥ Experience a unique otome game infused with thrilling Cthulhu elements!

Character info

MC-Orli Anticia (Can be renamed)

Originally working as a detective at the Clark's Detective Agency in the city, she temporarily moved to Usodar town due to a sudden and mysterious commission. She has a cheerful and kind personality, with strong powers of observation and intuition.

She have a difficult childhood shadow that cannot be erased.

Dane Godioby

CV: Nick Chang

A resident of Usodar Town, he is the new landlord of MC and operates a charming pet café located downstairs from her office. With the warmth of a gentle big brother, he brews world-class coffee and takes exceptional care of her. Always the first to come to her aid in times of danger, he seems to know an extraordinary amount about her—bordering on obsession.

Luke Errahwin

CV: John Patneaude

A spy investigator who arrived from out of town a few months ago.

He exudes an air of idleness and nonchalance. With his charming demeanor and warm personality, he quickly won the hearts of the locals. However, beneath this pleasant exterior lies a hidden agenda. A particular trait of MC has captured his attention, and he watches her closely, like a hawk.

No prey can ever escape his keen observation.

Enox HarvardAff

CV: Corey Wilder

A resident of Usodar Town, he claims to be a chemist, but both his identity and occupation remain shrouded in mystery. Until he met MC, who had just arrived in town, he had little contact with anyone. Her presence has completely upended his life, leaving him with a complex mix of love and resentment toward her.

Sid Whiteknight

CV: Logan Fletcher

MC’s childhood friend, he works as a detective at the Clark Detective Agency but is often absent, functioning as a phantom employee about 80% of the time. Despite his frequent disappearances, he consistently completes assignments with impressive speed. A skilled detective, much about his background remains a mystery.

Though he often seems indifferent to MC, he truly cares for her deeply.

G#

CV: Harold Ingram

He is the lead vocalist of the renowned indie heavy metal band, SOUL.

With a lively and energetic demeanor, he exudes a playful charisma that attracts many fans. He frequently hovers around MC, flirting with her in an attempt to capture her attention. Although he seems to share a good rapport with Dane, there is an underlying tension between them that suggests some private resentment.

Clark Marbury(His route will be updated for free in a future update.)

CV: Brandon P Jenkins

The owner of Clark's Detective Agency and MC's boss.

He is a former police officer who has vowed to assist MC in uncovering the truth behind her parents' murder, secretly offering her protection along the way. Having known Dane for many years, he presents an image of unreliability, but beneath that facade lies a serious determination; he will stop at nothing to achieve his goals.

data.short_description: Yandere x Otome x Mystery A mystery Otome game with all yandere love interest, play as a detective and find out the truth!
data.supported_languages:
English*, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 7 SP1 or higher
  • Processor: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
  • Storage: 3 MB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system

mac_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: 10.10+
  • Processor: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo (64 bit only)
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 3.0
  • Storage: 1 GB available space

linux_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Ubuntu 16.04+
  • Processor: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 3.0
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
